text: Hey there everyone, my name is Zitesh and before we move on into this course, I

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: would like to take small amount of time of yours to make sure that I share

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: something very personal to you and since this is a mobile development entire

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: course, I would love to share my journey of mobile development as well.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: See, my name is Hitesh and I've been writing code for almost more than 15 years probably

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: I guess.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: I haven't counted but it's almost like that.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: And I was never a programmer in the initial days.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: I started my journey as a penetration tester and cyber security.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: So security was all the fun that I enjoyed.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: And to be very honest, in those days I didn't like programming that much.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: I was very happy in cybersecurity ecosystem.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: But then one day I found out about mobile application development.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: And I instantly fell in love with programming.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: The amount of programming that I truly started to learn,

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: I knew programming before that as well, bits and pieces,

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: but the real world implementation that I truly learned

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: was through the mobile development itself.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: For the very first time I felt that I not only can create things but actually I can create something very

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: personalized which lives in my phone and I can carry it day in and day out.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: After that I built so many application to help my dad for me personally. A lot of them were very naive

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: but it was very personal to me.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: that first thing helped me to fall in love with programming. So mobile

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: development ecosystem will always get a special place in my heart because this

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: is so close to me. This is where first time I saw that the huge potential as

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: well as love of building something and now we are in the age of AI. It doesn't

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: matter whether AI is helping you to know the concept and write it faster and

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: build your product faster or you're writing the entire code on your own

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: doesn't really matter.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: What matters is that you can build something very personal for yourself or some company or somebody in the family or friend and

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: They can keep this entire thing with them in their personal phone is a very personal device

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: And not only that once I fell into love of building so many of these applications

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: Also, I noticed that there's a huge demand in mobile application ecosystem

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: but not enough people who are taking interest in it and

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: I saw that a lot of people learn different kind of things, maybe machine learning, maybe

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: AI, maybe backend engineering or maybe web development but chances are high, here is

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: the small test, that if you're watching a video on the YouTube, chances are high that

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: you majorly watch it on a mobile app.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: If you're watching it on Udemy, chances are high that you're watching it on the mobile

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: app as well.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: So every single application which is going viral needs a mobile app and I was always wondering why there are not enough mobile engineers or mobile developers who can actually take those roles.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: Every single company always struggles in hiring those engineers because there are very few of them and that's what happened early in my career as well.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: I started to building mobile apps, I was enjoying it and then I saw opportunities coming to my way.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: I build so many applications remotely for the US client, for Japanese client, for Vietnamese client and all of that

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: right sitting at my home and I was able to charge whatever I wish for because

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: there are not enough bids on those freelancing projects.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: There's nobody who can actually build an end-to-end mobile application and serve it to the people.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: And when there is a demand which is low, you can definitely charge.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: Now, nowadays, the demand is definitely going a little on the higher side, but still, compared

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: to web development or machine learning or any other profession, mobile development is

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: still an untapped territory where not many people are there to tap into.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: So...

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: My humble request is take this very very seriously. This course is all that you need

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: We have worked really hard to make sure that whatever is required to build a full-fledged mobile application

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: We serve you all of that material. Not only that we help you that how you can utilize these

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: Resources and skill to build application that can be AI powered as well

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: It doesn't really matter whether your app is AI powered, AI consumption user, whatever it is.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: You will be able to build that.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: This course has enough material, in fact more than material,

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: that is required to build any kind of mobile application.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: We have worked really hard in assembling the curriculum, writing code for it and then recording

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: part as well.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: In this course especially I was moreover worried about the curriculum, the architecture and

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: the decisions of which curriculum should come after the next one.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: We have worked really hard, me and Suraj both on this one.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: But yes, just wanted to take a moment to share this personal thought about my journey of

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: mobile development.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: I still enjoy it.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: I have a lot of applications in my phone that are very personal to me.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: Recently I gifted one application to my wife as well.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: She's an avid book reader and she wanted one so I built one for her.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: And I want you to do the exactly same, not gifting application to your wife, but to build

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: something very personal for your friends, for yourself and enjoy the building process,

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: enjoy the building of mobile application.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: That is it.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt

text: Let's catch up in next video.

metadata.source: class-subtitle/module 1 hc/Something personal for Mobile development_epm/Something personal for Mobile development_epm.vtt
